name: analyze-trust-suite
description: End-to-end data analysis pipeline + trust evaluation + meta-orchestrator. 6-stage analysis (define-analysis → kaggle-discover → {colab,local}-setup → hypothesis-eda → analysis-cycle → verify-report) + 4-stage trust (trust-metrics-llm ∥ trust-metrics-code → qa-reviewer → head-of-data) + 10-step meta-orchestrator (/analyze-trust). Plus Ralph Loop (wonder→reflect→restate), post-hoc review harness, and dashboard-state migration.
